name: Taha Mahmoud
heroTagline: Frontend Engineer crafting fast, accessible & beautiful web experiences.
description: Front-End Developer passionate about building scalable and user-friendly web applications. Experienced in working across multi-project environments, designing reusable UI systems, and maintaining clean, efficient front-end code. I enjoy turning business requirements into practical, maintainable solutions and continuously learning new tools and best practices to enhance performance and user experience.
aboutDescription: I'm a front-end developer passionate about crafting clean, responsive interfaces. Design, functionality, and performance are at the heart of everything I build. Always curious, I'm constantly exploring new tools and frameworks to improve my skills. My focus is always on delivering experiences that are both useful and enjoyable.
